title: GitHub Actions Secret
description: Represents an encrypted secret for GitHub Actions. The encrypted value is never returned by the API.

created_at.description: The date and time the secret was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the secret was last updated.

visibility.description: The visibility scope of the secret (organization secrets only).

selected_repositories_url.description: The API URL to manage selected repositories for this secret (organization secrets with selected visibility only).
